blocks.text: PSG-Monaco on a knife's edge as Champions League night delivers

Bodø/Glimt's 2-1 win at Internazionale last night was Norway's finest European moment in years. Tonight, four more CL second legs complete the round — led by a French derby that could eliminate either side.
UEFA rejected Benfica's appeal — key attacker Prestianni is suspended tonight at the Bernabéu. Real Madrid's slender aggregate lead may prove just enough.
